sections.sectionTitle: Nungzuite in Sabbath Ni-in Mangbuhvui Zut

verses.text: Tua zawh a sawtloin Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesuh a pai hi. A nungzuite a gil uh kial ahih manin mangbuhvuite zutin a ne uh hi
Farisi mite in a muh uh ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “En in, Sabbath ni-in i hih dingin a kilawmlo gamtatna na nungzuite gamta uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “David leh a kikholhpihte a gilkial laitakun David' gamtatna thu sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam
Pasian' innsungah amah lut a, siampite lobuang, amah leh a kikholhpihte in a nektheih ding a hilo Ompihna Anlum la-in amah leh a kikholhpihte in a ne uh hi
Tua ahih kei leh zong siampite in Sabbath sim mahin biakinn sungah Sabbath thukham khial napi-in mawhsakna a ngah tuanlohna thu uh, Moses Thukham sungah sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam
Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tua biakinn sangin a lianzaw khat hih lai-ah hong om hi
Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Ganhing tawh biak ding ka deih kei a, migitna ka deihzaw hi,’ a cihnopna thu teltakin thei le uh cin a mawhlopi kimlai na mawhsak kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Tua lai panin Jesuh paisuakin amau kikhopna innsungah a lut hi

Tua lai-ah a khut langkhat a zaw mi khat a na om hi. Jesuh gamta khial hi, ci-in a mawhna a zong nuam mi pawlkhat tua lai-ah om uh ahih manin tua mite in Jesuh kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in cina damsak ding a kilawm mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note khatpeuh in tuu khat nei un la, Sabbath ni-in dum sungah tua tuu kia leh, tua tuu va lenin kaikhiato ding hilo na hi uh hiam
Mi pen tuu sangin nakpi takin manphazaw ahih manin Sabbath ni-in a hoih sep ding a kilawm ahi hi,” ci-in a dawn' khit ciangin
a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. A mipa in zong a khut zanpah a, midangte mah bangin hoihtakin a damkik hi
Ahi zongin Farisi mite paikhia uh a, Jesuh a thahtheihna ding uh vai a hawm uh hi.
Jesuh in amah a kisawmna thu a theih ciangin tua mun panin a paikhia hi. Mi tampi in amah hong zui uh hi. Amah in cina mi khempeuh damsak a
Pasian in kamsang Isaiah tung tawnin a gen thu a tun'theihna dingin, kuama kiangah ama thu a genlohna dingun thu a pia hi. Tua a genna-ah
“Keimah in ka teelsa ka nasempa, ka it mahmah, ka lungkimnapa en un. Keima Kha ama tungah ka pia ding a, Gentail mite tungah upna man a pulak ding hi
Amah in thu seelloin, a aw sangsaklo ding a, konglakah zong a awging kizalo ding hi
Amah in a zawngkhal mite dopbawl ding a, a cimawh mite tungah migi ding hi. Thuman thutang a gualzawhsak mateng khawl ngeilo ding hi
Gentail mite in amah bek mah lametin nei ding uh hi,” ci hi.
Tua ciangin mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah mittawt leh pau theihloh a thuah dawivei mi khat hong paipih uh hi. Jesuh in amah damsak ahih manin amah hong pauthei-in khua zong hong muthei hi
Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Hihpa, i lametet David' suan hilo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Farisi mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Dawimangpa Beelzebul min tawh dawi a hawlkhia hi lel hi,” a ci uh hi

Jesuh in amaute' ngaihsutna thei ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Gam khat peuhpeuh, a gammite kiphelkhamin pawlkhat leh pawlkhat kido le uh tua gam a sia suak ding hi; khua khat ahi a, innkuan khat ahi zongin kiphelkhamin kido le uh kiplo ding hi
Tua mah bangin Satan leh Satan kihawlkhia le uh a ukna bangci kip theih ding ahi hiam
Keimah in Beelzebul vangliatna tawh dawite hawlkhia ka hih leh na mipihte un a kua' vangliatna tawh hawlkhia ahi uh hiam? Na mipihte un na ngaihsut khialhna uh hong kilangsak hi
Note' ngaihsut bang hiloin, Pasian' Kha in dawi hawlkhiatna ding vangliatna kei tungah hong pia ahih manin note lakah Pasian' ukna hun hong kipan khin ahihna hong kilang hi

Mi khatpeuh in mi thahat khatpa' innsungah lutin a neihsate a laksak theihna dingin tua inn nei a thahatpa a hencip masak phot ding kisam hi. A hencip zawh khit ciang bekin a inn-ah lutin a neihsate lathei pan hi
Kei hong pawlpihlo peuhmah keima lang hi uh a, kei hong kaihkhoppih lo peuhmah a thehthang ahi uh hi
Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Mihingte' kampau khialhna leh gamtat khialhnate kimaisak thei ding a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho langpangin a gensiate kimaisak lo ding hi
Mihing Tapa langpangin a gensiate a mawhna uh kimaisak thei ding a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho langpangin a gensiate pen tuhuna kipan a tawntungin a mawhna uh kimaisaklo ding hi.
“Singgah limci a gahtheihna dingin a kung a cidam phot ding kisam a, a kung gina kei leh a gah limcilo hi. Tua ahih manin singkung khat a pianzia pen a gahin hong kithei hi
Gul bangin ngian a zang note aw, migilo na hih uh ciangin bangci-in thuhoih genthei mah ding na hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh lungsim sunga thu om pen kam in a genkhia hi bek hi
Mihoihte in a hoih a kholteng suahkhia a, migilote in gitlohna a kholteng a suahkhia ahi hi
Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Thukhen ni ciangin mi khempeuh in phattuamna a omlo a kampaunate uh khempeuh bangin thusitna a thuak ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nomau kampauna tawh kizui-in thu hong kikhen ding a, dik hi, cihna ahi a, mawh hi, cihna ahi zongin na ngahna dingun nomau kampau mah hong kibulphuh ding hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Tuhun Migilote in Lim Khat Ngen

verses.text: Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, na lamdang khat nong lah ding ka deih uh hi,” ci-in a ngen uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Tuhuna mite bangzahin giloin, Pasian' thu theilo ahi uh hiam? Na lamdang ka bawl ding na hong ngen tazen uh hi. Jonah thu tawh kisai na lamdang longal adang hong kilaklo ding hi
Ngasa gilpi sungah sun thum leh zan thum sung Jonah a om mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong sun thum leh zan thum sung mah leisungah om ding hi

Jonah in amaute kiangah thu a hilh ciangin a mawhna panun kisikkik uh ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin Nineveh khuamite in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tu mahmahin note kiangah Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat a om hi

Leitaw lam gam kumpinu in Solomon' pilna thu a ngai dingin leitung phelkhat kantanin hong pai ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin amah in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding hi. Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tu mahmahin hih lai-ah Solomon sangin a lianzaw khat a om hi.
“Mi khatpeuh sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit ciangin a ten'na ding mun keuna zongin a vak kawikawi hi. Ahi zongin a ten'na ding mun a muh zawhloh ciangin
‘Ka paikhiatnasa inn mahah ciahkik ning,’ ci hi. A hong paikik ciangin tua inn na awnglai a, kipuah siangin hoihtakin a om a mu hi

Tua ciangin va paikik a, amah sangin a siahuaizaw dawi sagih hong tun'pihin tua mipa sungah a teng uh hi. Tua ahih manin tua mipa pianzia pen a masa huna sangin a siazaw hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuhuna migilote zong hih mipa' pianzia mah tawh kibang ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tua bangin mite kiangah thu genin a om laitakin a pualamah a nu leh a naute in Jesuh hopih nuamin a om uh hi
Tua ahih manin tua lai-ah a om mite khat in Jesuh kiangah, “Na nu leh na naute in nang hong hopih nuamin a pualamah om uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in tua mipa kiangah, “Ka nu kua bangte hi a, ka naute kua bangte ahi uh hiam?” a cih khit ciangin
a nungzuite lam kawk a, “Hihte pen ka nu leh ka sanggamte ahi uh hi
Vantungah a om ka Pa' deihna bangin a gamta mi peuhmah ka sanggam pasal, ka sanggam numei, ka nu ahi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
